text.content: Q1: Experience leading global GTM (100+ people)

I led Sales at Penbrothers, a B2B SaaS platform in the Philippines. When I joined, the sales operation was ad-hoc - no real process, no forecasting, CRM was a data graveyard. In 12 months, I: Rebuilt the entire outbound engine, designed territories from scratch, built a forecasting model that worked - 3x revenue growth. Also mentored 250+ startups through 500 Startups and Plug and Play. Every one struggled with pipeline mystery, CRM decay, and forecast fantasy. I've solved all three at scale.

Implemented HubSpot from ground up at Penbrothers. Built automated outbound sequences (3x industry average), created lead scoring models, set up pipeline automation, integrated with ZoomInfo/Apollo/Clearbit, enforced CRM hygiene. Philosophy: HubSpot is a mirror - if your data is messy, your decisions are bad.

Commit-Expected-Best model: Commit (100% confident), Expected (weighted by stage/history), Best (upside). Built in HubSpot with custom fields. Every week we knew exactly what we would close - not a range. Drove 3x growth at Penbrothers.
1) The problem is real - B2B payment fraud is a $5T problem. 2) The inflection point - going from regional to global is exactly the phase I thrive in. Based in Tokyo, time zones don't scare me.

What: HubSpot workflow that routes leads to right regional team based on company location. Why: Leads get routed manually/randomly, causing slow response times. Expect: Every lead assigned to right rep within seconds, follow-ups at local business hours. Steps: Create region property, build routing workflow, create 3 email sequences, test with 10 leads. Time: 2-4 hours. ROI: 20-30% faster response.

What: Workflows that detect duplicates, score data completeness, flag stale records. Why: With 100+ people, data gets messy - garbage in, garbage out. Expect: Weekly duplicate checks, completeness scores, stale deal alerts. Steps: Enable duplicate detection, create completeness score property, build stale deal workflow. Time: 3-5 hours. ROI: 50% fewer duplicates.

What: Unified dashboard showing pipeline across all regions. Why: Manually pulling reports from each region is slow and error-prone. Expect: One dashboard, click to filter by region, see Commit/Expected/Best. Steps: Create forecast properties, build HubSpot dashboard, set up alerts. Time: 4-6 hours. ROI: Real-time visibility.
